name: PEB Constructions
description:
Choosing a PEB construction company in India comes down to one question: who will design, supply and erect a steel building that fits your span, your site and your budget? SAMAN does all three on a single turnkey contract — from structural design through fabrication to bolted on-site erection. This page maps the full SAMAN range so you can match the building you need to the right product, compare spans and price bands, and go straight to a quote.

Which PEB structure should you build — warehouse, factory, shed or multi-storey?

Start from what you're putting up and the budget you're working to. SAMAN's range spans three practical tiers. For workshops, single-bay sheds and smaller warehouses that need a sound clear-span steel frame without a heavy budget, begin with Engineered Steel Structures (from ₹19.25 lakh), Pre-Engineered Building Suppliers (from ₹19.25 lakh) or PEB Building Manufacturers (from ₹19.35 lakh). To extend the span and bay count for a larger standard build, look at Engineered Buildings (from ₹22.85 lakh) and Prefab Building Construction (from ₹23.65 lakh). For a working factory unit, godown or mid-size warehouse needing wider column-free space, PEB warehouse construction at this scale is covered by PEB Construction (from ₹25.55 lakh), Pre-engineering Structures (from ₹27.25 lakh), Construction Prefabricated Buildings (from ₹27.75 lakh), Pre-engineered Structures (from ₹28.35 lakh) and Prefab Modular Construction (from ₹31.85 lakh). For a large warehouse, a heavy industrial plant, or a structure carrying a mezzanine or extra floor, the heavier portal frames are PEB Steel Structure (from ₹47.25 lakh) and Prefabricated Construction (from ₹53.45 lakh).

PEB construction range — spans, applications and indicative price bands

Every build above is delivered on the same turnkey basis — designed in-house, fabricated from IS-certified steel, then erected on your site by bolted assembly. The tiers compare like this; for the full design-to-erection process, see our turnkey PEB construction service.
Build tier Typical span & use Starting price Best for
Entry steel building Short-to-medium clear span, single/low bay from ₹19.25 lakh Workshops, small sheds, single-bay warehouses
Standard PEB building Medium clear span, multi-bay from ₹22.85 lakh Factory units, godowns
Larger clear-span PEB Wide, column-free span from ₹27.25 lakh Mid-to-large warehouses, logistics
Heavy / multi-storey steel Heavy portal frame or stacked floors from ₹47.25 lakh Large warehouses, plants, multi-storey

What does PEB construction cost, and what's included in the price?

A PEB construction in India typically runs from around ₹19.25 lakh for an entry steel building to ₹53.45 lakh for a large or multi-storey structure. The final figure depends on clear span, eave height, roof and wall cladding grade, any mezzanine floor, and site location — because in a turnkey build, on-site erection is included in the price, not billed separately afterwards. What moves a PEB building construction quote up or down is mostly the engineering: a wider column-free span and a higher eave need a heavier frame, and bay spacing, wind and seismic zone, and crane-beam or mezzanine loads all add steel. Cladding choice (single-skin vs insulated panels), flooring and the access doors you specify do the rest. SAMAN quotes each project against its actual drawing, so the starting prices above are real entry points, not teaser figures.

What to expect when SAMAN designs, supplies and erects your building

SAMAN runs the full build, not just the supply. Structural design is done in-house against your span, loading and local code; steel is fabricated to IS standards in our own units; and the frame is delivered and erected on your site by bolted assembly, which keeps site time and wet-work to a minimum. Two manufacturing bases — Bangalore (Karnataka) and Greater Noida (Uttar Pradesh) — let us cover projects across India from design through commissioning under one contact. Every unit is made to order, so portal frame, eave height, bay spacing, cladding and openings are configured to the building you actually need rather than a fixed catalogue size.

Before you commission a PEB build — buyer FAQs

What is the cost of PEB construction?

Across SAMAN's range it runs from about ₹19.25 lakh for an entry steel building to ₹53.45 lakh for a large or multi-storey structure. The exact figure is set by span, eave height, cladding grade, any mezzanine and site location, and is quoted against your drawing — erection included.

What's the difference between hiring a PEB construction company and buying a pre-engineered building?

A PEB construction company designs, supplies and erects the structure on your site as a turnkey job — which is what this range does. Buying a pre-engineered building on its own means you take supply of the steel components and arrange erection separately. If you only want the building product supplied, that sits under SAMAN's pre-engineered building range rather than this construction service.

What can SAMAN build — warehouses, factory sheds or both?

Both, plus godowns, workshops, logistics buildings, industrial plants and multi-storey steel structures. The clear-span frame is sized to the use, so the same turnkey process covers a single-bay shed and a wide-span warehouse alike.

How long does it take to design and erect a PEB structure?

Because components are fabricated in the factory and assembled by bolting on site, a PEB build is markedly faster than conventional RCC. Timelines depend on span, size and approvals; we confirm a schedule once the design is fixed at the quoting stage.

Do you handle PEB construction across India?

Yes. With units in Bangalore and Greater Noida, SAMAN takes PEB construction projects pan-India, managing design, fabrication, delivery and on-site erection from a single point of contact.

Is a PEB construction the same as an industrial shed?

An industrial shed is one of the things a PEB construction builds — a single-use steel shed. PEB construction is the broader engineered-building service that also covers wide-span warehouses, factory blocks and multi-storey structures. If you specifically need a standalone shed, that's covered by SAMAN's industrial shed range.

Get a PEB construction quote for your site

Send us your span, eave height, intended use and location, and we'll quote your PEB build against an actual design — supply and on-site erection included. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
